name: Swiggy MCP Server — Food Delivery
what_it_does: Official Swiggy MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with Swiggy's food delivery platform — searching restaurants and food items, checking delivery options and ETAs, browsing menus, and integrating Swiggy's food delivery capabilities into agent-driven personal assistant and food ordering workflows in India.
use_cases: Searching Swiggy restaurants and food items from personal assistant agents
Checking food delivery availability and ETAs from planning agents
Discovering restaurant options by cuisine or rating from recommendation agents
Browsing menus and prices from meal planning agents
Tracking Swiggy deliveries from order management agents
Building food-aware personal assistant integrations for Indian users
not_for: Automated food ordering without human approval
best_when: An AI personal assistant needs to search Swiggy for food options, browse menus, or check delivery availability in Indian cities.
avoid_when: You're outside Swiggy's delivery areas or prefer Zomato — use the Zomato MCP instead.

auth.notes: Swiggy API access required. Check Swiggy developer portal for API access. Official MCP from Swiggy engineering team.

pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise API access may require commercial agreement
pricing.notes: Official Swiggy MCP. API access requires developer portal registration.

performance.rate_limits: Swiggy API: rate limits per API tier

known_agent_gotchas: Swiggy API developer access is not widely publicized — approval process unclear
Restaurant and menu data changes frequently — always fetch fresh data
Delivery availability depends on user's GPS/location context
Official Swiggy MCP — likely less widely tested than Zomato's equivalent
India-only coverage — not available in most international markets
Never automate order placement — always require user confirmation
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Official Swiggy MCP. Location data for delivery — privacy considerations. OAuth auth. No automated ordering.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS. Official Swiggy. Location privacy. OAuth. No automated ordering.
